messages.text: Choking smoke billows up around you; blows go wide as you slip through the haze.
A cloud of choking smoke billows up around {name}, veiling them from sight.
The smoke thins and drifts apart, leaving you exposed once more.
The smoke veiling {name} thins and drifts apart.
{name} is shrouded in a drifting cloud of choking smoke.
